title: Add user-created pages and posts management

requirements.text: Implement a backend data model and API for custom pages: each page has a unique ID, title, content (rich text or markdown), author, and creation/update timestamps. Expose create, read, update, and delete (CRUD) operations as query/update calls in the Motoko actor.

quotes: I want add my own pages and post

acceptanceCriteria: A page can be created with a title and content body
All pages can be listed and individual pages retrieved by ID
A page can be updated and deleted by its author
Page records persist across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Implement a backend data model and API for posts: each post has a unique ID, title, body content, author, and creation/update timestamps. Expose CRUD operations for posts as query/update calls in the Motoko actor.

quotes: I want add my own pages and post

acceptanceCriteria: A post can be created with a title and body
All posts can be listed and individual posts retrieved by ID
A post can be updated and deleted by its author
Post records persist across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Add a 'Pages' section to the frontend where authenticated users can create a new custom page (title + content editor), view a list of all pages, edit their own pages, and delete their own pages. Display pages in a card grid consistent with the existing site theme (red accent #d9002c, Merriweather/Inter fonts).

quotes: I want add my own pages and post

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Pages' navigation link appears in the site header
Clicking 'New Page' opens a form with title and content fields
Submitted pages appear in the pages list immediately
Edit and Delete controls appear on pages owned by the logged-in user
Unauthenticated users can view pages but cannot create, edit, or delete

requirements.text: Add a 'Posts' section to the frontend where authenticated users can create a new post (title + body editor), view a list of all posts in reverse-chronological order, edit their own posts, and delete their own posts. Style consistently with the existing academy theme.

quotes: I want add my own pages and post

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Posts' navigation link appears in the site header
Clicking 'New Post' opens a form with title and body fields
Submitted posts appear at the top of the posts list
Edit and Delete controls appear on posts owned by the logged-in user
Unauthenticated users can view posts but cannot create, edit, or delete

requirements.text: Wire the frontend Pages and Posts sections to the backend using the existing useActor hook and React Query for data fetching, mutation, and cache invalidation.
acceptanceCriteria: Creating, updating, or deleting a page/post triggers a React Query cache invalidation and re-fetches the list
Loading and error states are shown while async operations are in progress
No page refresh is required to see newly created or updated content

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the existing red-accented visual theme (#d9002c) and typography (Merriweather, Inter)
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo)
nonGoals: Rich text WYSIWYG editor (plain textarea is sufficient)
Public user profiles or follower/following social features
Image or file uploads within pages or posts
